Patch Set 35:

currently for scenario 1 vFW is being instantiated on default namespace (should be vfirewall one), so we have some kind of problem in the CBA after latest enrichment

Patch Set 35:

in data_types.json for resource-assignment-properties we have bunch of default values present now. Before they were not and in consequence, due to some reason, value comming from the input is ignored and this default is used instead.
